headline: Has The Recent Share Price Slide Created An Opportunity In Visa (V)?
summary: If you are wondering whether Visa is priced attractively right now or if the market has already baked in the story, this article walks through the key valuation clues that matter for you. Visa recently closed at US$304.44, with returns of a 1.8% decline over the last 7 days, a 5.1% decline over 30 days, a 12.1% decline year to date and a 10.8% decline over 1 year, while the 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 40.4% and 47.2% respectively. Recent coverage has focused on Visa's position in global...

headline: Pudgy World Lands On Amazon Marketplace, Allows Users To Customize Their Penguin With 'Exclusive' Digital Traits
